title: How Helm resolves and locks chart dependencies
description: Explains Chart.yaml dependencies, conditions/tags for toggling subcharts, Chart.lock pinning, and the charts/ directory population.
body: Use when reasoning about how subcharts are pulled in. Do not assume dependencies are fetched at install time. Actions: know dependencies are declared in Chart.yaml with version ranges and a repository, helm dependency update resolves them, writes Chart.lock, and populates charts/; conditions and tags enable/disable a subchart from parent values. Inspect Chart.lock and helm dependency list. Validation signals include Chart.lock pinning exact versions and a condition toggling a subchart in/out of the render. Risk boundary: an unpinned dependency range can pull an unexpected version; pinning via Chart.lock is the safe default.
